cot_prefix: Okay, let me think through this question. The passage is about pen pals and the safety considerations when communicating with them. The question asks what you should do when communicating with a pen pal, and the options are A through D. First, I need to recall the relevant part of the passage. The text says: "Make sure to share all letters and e-mails with your parents so they know you are safe. If something seems _ , stop writing letters. Never meet a pen pal in person unless a grown-up is with you." Looking at the options: A) Keep all the pen pal's letters and e-mails in private. But the passage says to share them with parents, so this contradicts the text. So A is incorrect. B) Meet him/her with one of your classmates. The passage says not to meet unless a grown-up is present. A classmate isn't a grown-up, so B is incorrect. C) Be sure you are safe at any time. The passage emphasizes safety by sharing communications with parents and not meeting without a grown-up. This seems to align with C.
